Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the empire that dominated West Africa from the 13th to the 16th century?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: The Mali Empire, founded by Sundiata Keïta, was one of the greatest empires in African history.

Histoire du Mali.question: Who was the most famous ruler of the Mali Empire?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Mansa Moussa (1312-1337) is considered the richest man in history.

Histoire du Mali.question: Which city was the capital of the Mali Empire?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Niani was the political capital of the Mali Empire.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the main export product of the Mali Empire?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Mali's gold was so abundant that it influenced the world economy of the time.

Histoire du Mali.question: Which university was the most prestigious in the Mali Empire?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: The University of Sankoré in Timbuktu was a renowned center of learning.

Histoire du Mali.question: Which Arab explorer visited the Mali Empire in the 14th century?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Ibn Battuta left detailed accounts of his trip to Mali.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the main religion of the Mali Empire?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Islam spread in the Mali Empire from the 11th century.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the system of government of the Mali Empire?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: The Mali Empire was a monarchy ruled by a Mansa (king).

Histoire du Mali.question: What was Timbuktu's main source of wealth?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Timbuktu was a major trading crossroads between North Africa and sub-Saharan Africa.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the dynasty that founded the Mali Empire?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: The Keïta dynasty founded and ruled the Mali Empire for several centuries.

Histoire du Mali.question: In what year did Mali obtain its independence?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Mali gained its independence from France on September 22, 1960.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the medieval empire that dominated West Africa?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: The Mali Empire, founded in the 13th century, was one of the largest and richest empires in West Africa.

Histoire du Mali.question: Who founded the Mali Empire in the 13th century?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Sundiata Keïta founded the Mali Empire after his victory at Kirina around 1235.

Histoire du Mali.question: In what year did Mansa Moussa make his famous pilgrimage to Mecca?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Mansa Moussa undertook his famous pilgrimage to Mecca in 1324, distributing so much gold that it caused its price to plummet.

Histoire du Mali.question: Which river crosses Mali from north to south?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: The Niger River crosses Mali and was the main route of commerce and life of the Mali Empire.

Histoire du Mali.question: Which Malian city is nicknamed "the pearl of the desert"?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Timbuktu, nicknamed the pearl of the desert, was a great commercial and intellectual center of West Africa.

Histoire du Mali.question: Who was the first president of independent Mali?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Modibo Keïta was the first president of independent Mali, from 1960 to 1968.

Histoire du Mali.question: In what year was democracy reestablished in Mali?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Democracy was restored in Mali in 1992 after the fall of Moussa Traoré's regime.

Histoire du Mali.question: What is the name of the great mosque of Djenne?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: The Great Mosque of Djenné, the largest mud building in the world, symbolizes Sudano-Sahelian architecture.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the empire that preceded the Mali Empire?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: The Empire of Ghana, prosperous thanks to the gold trade, preceded the Empire of Mali in West Africa.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was Mansa Moussa's nickname?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Mansa Moussa was nicknamed the King of Kings because of the immense power and wealth of his empire.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the main economic resource of the Mali Empire?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Gold, extracted from the mines of Bouré and Bambouk, was the main wealth of the Mali Empire.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the first capital of independent Mali?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Bamako, on the banks of the Niger River, became the capital of Mali upon its independence in 1960.

Histoire du Mali.question: In what year did the Mali Empire reach its peak?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: The Mali Empire reached its peak in the 14th century, notably under the reign of Mansa Moussa.

Histoire du Mali.question: Which city was the most important commercial center of the Mali Empire?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Timbuktu was the main commercial center of the Mali Empire, a crossroads for the trans-Saharan trade in gold and salt.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the most famous university in Timbuktu?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: The University of Sankoré, in Timbuktu, was one of the greatest centers of Islamic knowledge in medieval Africa.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the first emperor of the Mali Empire?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Sundiata Keïta was the founder and first emperor of the Mali Empire in the 13th century.

Histoire du Mali.question: In what year did Sundiata Keita found the Mali Empire?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Sundiata Keïta founded the Mali Empire around 1235 after his victory over the Sosso king Soumaoro Kanté.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the battle that allowed Sundiata to conquer power?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: The Battle of Kirina, around 1235, marked the victory of Sundiata Keïta over Soumaoro Kanté and the birth of the Mali Empire.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the empire that succeeded the Mali Empire?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: The Songhai Empire succeeded the Mali Empire and became the greatest power in West Africa in the 15th-16th centuries.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the first democratically elected Malian president?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Alpha Oumar Konaré was the first democratically elected Malian president in 1992.

Histoire du Mali.question: In what year was Alpha Oumar Konare elected president?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Alpha Oumar Konaré was elected president of Mali in 1992, during the country's first democratic elections.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the constitution adopted in 1992 in Mali?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: The Constitution of the Third Republic, adopted in 1992, established a multi-party system in Mali.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the Malian prime minister who led the democratic transition?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Soumana Sacko led the transitional government that led Mali toward democracy in the early 1990s.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the region of Mali which was the cradle of the Mali Empire?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: The Kayes region in western Mali is considered the historic cradle of the Mali Empire.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the city which was the religious capital of the Mali Empire?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Djenné, holy city of Sudanese Islam, was the religious capital of the Mali Empire.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the oldest mosque in West Africa?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: The Great Mosque of Djenné, rebuilt in 1907 on a 13th century building, is one of the oldest mosques in West Africa.

Histoire du Mali.question: In what year was the Great Mosque of Djenne built?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: The first Great Mosque of Djenné was built in the 13th century, during the reign of the Mali Empire.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the official language of the Mali Empire?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Mandingo was the lingua franca of the Mali Empire, still spoken today in West Africa.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the currency used in the Mali Empire?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: The cowrie, a small shell, served as a common currency in the Mali Empire.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the trade route that crossed the Mali Empire?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: The trans-Saharan route connected the Mali Empire to North Africa for the exchange of gold for salt.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the city that was the center of learning for the Mali Empire?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Timbuktu was the great center of teaching and manuscripts of the Mali Empire, attracting scholars and students.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the most famous library in Timbuktu?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: The Ahmed Baba library in Timbuktu preserves thousands of ancient manuscripts testifying to medieval African knowledge.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the most famous Malian historian of the 16th century?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Ahmed Baba, a scholar from Timbuktu in the 16th century, was one of the greatest scholars of West Africa.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the city which was the military center of the Mali Empire?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Gao was an important military and administrative center of the Mali Empire, then capital of the Songhai Empire.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the first emperor of the Sonni dynasty?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Sonni Ali founded the Sonni dynasty and made Songhai the most powerful empire in West Africa.

Histoire du Mali.question: In what year did Sonni Ali conquer Timbuktu?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Sonni Ali conquered Timbuktu in 1468, making it part of the expanding Songhai Empire.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the city which was the administrative center of the Mali Empire?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Niani was the administrative capital of the Mali Empire, seat of power of the mansas.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the region which was the breadbasket of the Mali Empire?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: The Ségou region, fertile thanks to the Niger River, served as an agricultural granary for the Mali Empire.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the city which was the cultural center of the Mali Empire?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Timbuktu was the great cultural and intellectual center of the Mali Empire, renowned for its manuscripts and its scholars.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of the most famous Malian writer of the 20th century?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: Amadou Hampâté Bâ, a 20th century Malian writer and ethnologist, contributed to preserving the African oral tradition.

Histoire du Mali.question: What was the name of Amadou Hampate Ba's most famous work?
Histoire du Mali.explanation: The Strange Destiny of Wangrin, published in 1973, is Amadou Hampâté Bâ's most famous novel.
